title: CurrencyInput Amount Calculator
description: The system shall provide an inline calculator accessible from the CurrencyInput field.
acceptance_criteria: A calculator icon is present on the right side of the CurrencyInput field.
Clicking the icon opens the calculator interface.
The initial value is preset to the current field value, or 0 if empty or invalid.
The calculator supports (+, -, *, /, %) operations. The % operator acts as a 'percentage of' operation (e.g. A % B = A * B / 100).
The calculator has a Clear (C) and Backspace (<-) button.
The calculator provides a Decimal (.) button for fractional values.
The calculator has an '=' button to evaluate the current expression.
The calculator has a standalone 'Save' button that evaluates any remaining expression and applies the result to the CurrencyInput field, closing the calculator.
The calculator has a 'Cancel' mechanism that discards changes and closes the interface without applying the result.
